sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105710" key="trupaniko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῡπαν-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n105710.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of trepanning,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τέχνη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl> </cit> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in Hp.Fract.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2123.tlg001:12:275" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.275</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
